limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified dollar amounts or specific budget figures for AI investment disclosed in the excerpts; AI Research Lab and infrastructure investment described qualitatively only, limiting score to 3.

ai_narrative_concreteness: The AI-native cohort revenue growth figure (seven percentage points of YoY growth for Q4 2025) is a partial business result tied to customer usage rather than a direct product-level outcome metric; scored 4 rather than 5 as no direct product-level quantified results (e.g., time saved, accuracy %) are disclosed.
capex_mentions: No specific dollar amounts tied to AI/compute/data-center investment found in the excerpts; equipment purchases of $7.27M noted in financials but not attributed to AI specifically.
